definitions: Wix is a cloud-based web development platform that allows users to create HTML5 websites and mobile sites through the use of online drag and drop tools.
Wix.com Ltd. is an Israeli software company, publicly listed in the US, that provides cloud-based web development services.
examples: I built my portfolio website using Wix.
Wix offers various templates for different business types.
Many small businesses choose Wix for its ease of use.
